description: Star Atlas Golden Era is a browser-based real-time strategy game that operates on the Solana blockchain, focusing on territory control, logistics, resource extraction, and crafting.
topic_summary: The game features real-time interactions with Solana, emphasizing territory, conquest, logistics, and a future PVP arena [t=0:32-0:25]. All game logic is executed on Solana [t=0:22-0:25].
